## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this in simulation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests
- [ ] I have updated documentation
- [ ] My code passes `ruff check` and `ruff format --check`
- [ ] This change maintains privacy (no network calls added)
- [ ] This change maintains safety (no safety systems bypassed)
